name: Multi- Grain Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine boiling water with cracked wheat, 7-grain mixture, molasses, and safflower oil. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
2. Add yeast, sugar, whole wheat flour, rye flour, wheat germ, bran, nonfat dry milk powder, sunflower seeds, salt, and egg to the bowl with the grain mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Select the white bread setting on your bread machine and press "Start."
4. For a milder taste, substitute honey for molasses.
5. After the first kneading cycle, remove the dough from the machine and divide it into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion in small loaf pans, cover, and let rise until doubled in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sound when tapped on the bottom.
